title: pilosella densiflora
intro: Pilosella densiflora, also known as Mountain Sneezeweed, is a flowering plant in the dandelion family that grows in mountainous regions of Europe. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, making it useful for treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant is rich in flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting relaxation. Pilosella densiflora can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties.
